name: Pathmark Local App Windows
release: v0.7.3 Mobile containment and focus hierarchy polish
label: Mobile containment and focus hierarchy polish
release_notes: Polishes the hosted phone layout, removes horizontal overflow, and makes focus blocks/supporting time blocks appear as a proper nested hierarchy in projects and printable tasklists.
notes: Improves the hosted phone layout by preventing horizontal page overflow and making cards/text wrap within the screen width.
Focus blocks and supporting time blocks now render as a single nested project hierarchy rather than separate boxed fragments.
Supporting time blocks are visually indented inside the focus block they support while remaining excluded from project progress.
Printable tasklists now use proper indentation and subtle row styling for supporting time blocks instead of em-dash prefixes.
Tasklist widget keys are made unique per render to avoid duplicate-key failures if Streamlit renders a fallback path.
release_name: Mobile containment and focus hierarchy polish
